summary: Personal finance desktop app with multicurrency tracking and reports
description: Track wallets, tagged records, budgets, debts, assets, and goals across multiple currencies with built-in import, export, and reporting tools.

This patch refreshes the Linux software-center AppStream card and hardens packaged updater terminal handoff on Fedora and Ubuntu so terminal selection and launch both stay reliable during local .deb and .rpm installs.
release_notes: Refreshed the packaged Linux AppStream metadata card for the v2.6.1 patch release.
Fixed Fedora terminal chooser startup by waiting until the selection dialog is viewable before applying the modal grab.
Fixed Ubuntu, GNOME Console, Tilix, and Xfce-family terminal launch handoff by using terminal-specific documented command invocation modes.
Packaged Linux updater flows continue to reuse saved terminal preferences and keep .deb versus .rpm install commands aligned with the current package kind.
